allow: Bash(# List all reverb blocks in phelix gh api repos/sensorium/phelix/git/trees/main?recursive=1 --jq ''.tree[].path'')

Bash(# Check what amp HD2_AmpGermanMahadeva actually is - it exists in phelix # The file listing already shows it. Let''s verify the mapping from hxModels.js curl -sL ""https://raw.githubusercontent.com/dbagchee/helix-preset-viewer/master/src/hxModels.js"")
Bash(# Check if Line62204Mod exists curl -sL ""https://raw.githubusercontent.com/sensorium/phelix/main/blocks/Amp/HD2_AmpLine62204Mod.json"")
Bash(git add src/lib/helix/validate.ts src/lib/helix/index.ts src/lib/helix/preset-builder.ts src/app/api/generate/route.ts)
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; items=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(i[''name''],i[''size'']\) for i in items[:20]]")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; items=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(i[''name''],i[''type'']\) for i in items]")

Bash(python3 -c " import json, sys p = json.load\(sys.stdin\) # Just show the top-level keys and dsp0 keys print\(''=== TOP-LEVEL ===''\) print\(json.dumps\(list\(p.keys\(\)\), indent=2\)\) print\(''=== data keys ===''\) print\(json.dumps\(list\(p[''data''].keys\(\)\), indent=2\)\) print\(''=== tone keys ===''\) print\(json.dumps\(list\(p[''data''][''tone''].keys\(\)\), indent=2\)\) print\(''=== dsp0 keys ===''\) if ''dsp0'' in p[''data''][''tone'']: print\(json.dumps\(list\(p[''data''][''tone''][''dsp0''].keys\(\)\), indent=2\)\) ")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; items=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(i[''name''],i[''size'']\) for i in items[:5]]")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; items=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(i[''name'']\) for i in items[:5]]")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; items=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(i[''name''],i[''size'']\) for i in items[:10]]")

Bash(python3 -c " import json, sys p = json.load\(sys.stdin\) # Show the commandFS12 and footswitch sections and more detail on dsp0 tone = p[''data''][''tone''] if ''commandFS12'' in tone: print\(''=== commandFS12 ===''\) print\(json.dumps\(tone[''commandFS12''], indent=2\)\) if ''footswitch'' in tone: print\(''=== footswitch ===''\) print\(json.dumps\(tone[''footswitch''], indent=2\)\) print\(''=== global ===''\) print\(json.dumps\(tone[''global''], indent=2\)\) # Show the controller section if ''controller'' in tone: print\(''=== controller ===''\) print\(json.dumps\(tone[''controller''], indent=2\)\) ")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; items=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(i[''name''],i[''size'']\) for i in items]")

Bash(python3 -c " import json, sys d = json.load\(sys.stdin\) print\(''=== Defaults \(what goes in dsp0.block0\) ===''\) print\(json.dumps\(d[''Defaults''], indent=2\)\) print\(\) print\(''=== Controller_Dict \(what goes in controller.dsp0.block0\) ===''\) print\(json.dumps\(d[''Controller_Dict''], indent=2\)\) print\(\) print\(''=== SnapshotParams \(what goes in snapshot0.controllers.dsp0.block0\) ===''\) print\(json.dumps\(d[''SnapshotParams''], indent=2\)\) ")
